ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture URL */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user's profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the task */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time the task was created */,
  "periodic" INTEGER /* Whether the task is periodic (recurring) */,
  "deadline" INTEGER /* Deadline for the task (in seconds) */,
  "body" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the task */,
  "subtasks" TEXT /* Subtasks associated with the task */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or reminders */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the task needs to be completed */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or groups the task is shared with */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the task was completed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habits" (
  "habit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the habit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the habit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habit */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the habit (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the habit was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the habit was completed or discontinued */,
  "streak" INTEGER /* Current streak of performing the habit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or reminders */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or groups the habit is shared with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the habit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the habit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_habits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_habits" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "habit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the habit */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time the task was associated with the habit */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Completion status of the task as part of the habit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id", "habit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., love, money, energy) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reward was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reward was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wellness" (
  "wellness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wellness entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "love" INTEGER /* User's love metric */,
  "energy" INTEGER /* User's energy metric */,
  "stress" INTEGER /* User's stress metric */,
  "sleep" INTEGER /* User's sleep quality metric */,
  "mood" TEXT /* User's mood */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* User's physical activity level */,
  "diet" TEXT /* User's diet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the wellness entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the wellness entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the wellness entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wellness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wellness_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "money_credit" INTEGER /* User's financial reward or penalty */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the financial entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial entry */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the financial entry (e.g., payment, reward) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the financial entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the financial entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social connection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the social connection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the social connection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_friend_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., task completion rate) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analytics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
